title: Technology Leadership for the AI Era
description: Managing Director of Ordovera Advisory, where I help mid-market organizations build AI governance frameworks that manage risk and enablement programs that drive adoption.

capabilities.title: AI Governance & Enablement
capabilities.description: Building frameworks that accelerate AI adoption without creating ungovernable risk. Policy design, shadow AI discovery, and organizational readiness.

capabilities.title: Security & Risk
capabilities.description: Strengthening cybersecurity posture across multiple regulatory regimes. NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001, and enterprise GRC.

capabilities.title: Technology Leadership
capabilities.description: Making technology a strategic enabler rather than an operational constraint. Fractional CIO, implementation, and managed delivery offered through MADE, Inc.
